tagline: Don't Just Buy a Route - Buy Success!

hero.headline:
Own a Pool Route. Build Your
Empire.
hero.subheadline: Since 1977, we have matched over 10,000 buyers with profitable pool service routes across five states. Skip the startup grind and step into an established business with real customers and real revenue from day one.

services.label: What We Offer
services.headline: Your Roadmap to Pool Route<br class="hidden md:block"> Ownership
services.subtitle: Whether you are buying your first route or selling a portfolio you have built over decades, we provide the expertise and connections that make every transaction successful.

cards.title: Pool Route Brokerage
cards.description: We match qualified buyers with pool service professionals selling established routes. Our deep industry network means better deals and faster closings for everyone involved.

cards.title: Buyer Screening & Qualification
cards.description: Every prospective buyer goes through our rigorous verification process. Sellers work only with serious, pre-qualified candidates who are ready to close and succeed.

cards.title: Business Consulting
cards.description: Our Millionaire Pool Man program and expert advisors help you maximize profitability from the start. Get proven strategies for growing your route income fast.

cards.title: Route Acquisition Support
cards.description: We guide buyers through finding and purchasing routes across Arizona, California, Florida, Nevada, and Texas. Every step is handled with nearly 50 years of expertise.

cards.title: Post-Sale Mentoring
cards.description: Your success does not end at closing. Our mentoring program helps new route owners grow their customer base, increase revenue, and avoid common pitfalls.

cards.title: Route Selling Services
cards.description: Ready to sell your pool route? We have a proven track record of getting top dollar where other brokers have failed. Professional, fast, and always confidential.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Pool Route Ownership

steps.title: Schedule Your Consultation
steps.description: Tell us what you are looking for — location, route size, budget. We will walk you through available opportunities and answer every question with zero pressure.

steps.title: Get Matched With Your Route
steps.description: We connect you with pre-vetted routes that fit your goals. Review real customer lists, revenue history, and territory details before you commit to anything.

steps.title: Close and Start Earning
steps.description: We handle the paperwork and transition. You step into a fully operational pool service business with customers already on the books and income flowing from day one.

about.label: Why Buyers and Sellers Trust Us
about.headline: The Original Pool Route Brokers — Since 1977
about.description: Founded nearly five decades ago, National Pool Route Sales has brokered more pool route transactions than any firm in the country. With over 10,000 successful buyer-seller matches and offices across multiple states, we bring unmatched experience to every deal. Our team does not just broker routes — we mentor new owners, guide sellers through the process, and ensure every transaction sets both parties up for long-term success.

features.title: 10,000+ Successful Matches
features.description: No other pool route broker comes close to our track record. Every match is backed by rigorous screening and decades of market knowledge.

features.title: Multi-State Coverage
features.description: We operate across Arizona, California, Florida, Nevada, and Texas — the largest pool markets in the country. Wherever you want to buy or sell, we are there.

features.title: Post-Sale Mentoring Included
features.description: Our Millionaire Pool Man program and hands-on mentoring help new owners grow revenue fast. Your success is our reputation, and we take both seriously.

pricing.headline: Transparent Process. No Hidden Costs.
pricing.subtitle: Every consultation starts free. We walk you through the numbers, the territory, and the timeline — so you invest with complete confidence.

guarantee.headline: Our "Buyer Success" Guarantee
guarantee.description: We stand behind every transaction we broker. If the route does not perform as represented during your evaluation period, we work directly with you to resolve it. Our post-sale mentoring program is included at no extra cost because we are only successful when you are.

faqs.question: How much does a pool route cost?
faqs.answer: Routes range from small residential portfolios to large multi-truck operations. Pricing depends on the number of accounts, monthly revenue, and location. Schedule a free consultation and we will match you with routes that fit your budget and goals.

faqs.question: Do I need pool experience to buy a route?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Many of our most successful buyers came from completely different industries. Our post-sale mentoring and the Millionaire Pool Man program teach you everything you need to know to run a profitable pool service business.

faqs.question: What states do you cover?
faqs.answer: We broker routes across Arizona, California (both Northern and Southern), Florida, Nevada, and Texas. These are the largest residential pool markets in the country, and our local teams know each one inside and out.

faqs.question: How long does the buying process take?
faqs.answer: Most transactions close within 30 to 60 days from your first consultation. We handle buyer screening, documentation, and the transition plan so the process stays on track and stress-free.

faqs.question: Can you help me sell my existing pool route?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We have helped thousands of pool service professionals sell their routes for top dollar. Our buyer network is the largest in the industry, which means faster sales and better offers — even for routes other brokers could not move.

testimonials.name: Leland S.
testimonials.text: The business was begun with approximately 45 residential accounts just over a year ago and now we have about 90 accounts and the income has more than tripled.
testimonials.context: Millionaire Pool Man program success story

testimonials.name: Scott C.
testimonials.text: Every step of the process from the purchase through stepping into and operating the business went just as Charles said it would.

testimonials.name: Gary G.
testimonials.text: Following a couple of interviews with 2 other Pool Brokers, it was obvious to me that working with Charles and his 27 years of experience was the only intelligent choice to make.
